ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector (e.g., wind, solar) */,
  "sector_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the sector */,
  "sector_type" TEXT /* Type of energy (e.g., wind, solar, biofuels, biomass and waste, small hydro) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_production" (
  "production_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production record */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of production */,
  "production" REAL /* Amount of energy produced */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the energy is produced */,
  "technology_used" TEXT /* Technology used for energy production */,
  "production_cost" REAL /* Cost of production */,
  "production_efficiency" REAL /* Efficiency of the production process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("production_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_production_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_consumption" (
  "consumption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each consumption record */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of consumption */,
  "consumption" REAL /* Amount of energy consumed */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the energy is consumed */,
  "consumer_type" TEXT /* Type of consumer (e.g., residential, commercial, industrial) */,
  "consumption_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of energy consumption (e.g., heating, cooling, lighting) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("consumption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_consumption_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year */,
  "is_fiscal_year" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the year is a fiscal year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the database */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., read, write) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the database */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_imports" (
  "import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each import event */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of data */,
  "import_date" TEXT /* Date and time of import */,
  "import_type" TEXT /* Type of import (e.g., production, consumption) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., API, file upload) */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file if the data is imported from a file */,
  "import_status" TEXT /* Status of the import (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("import_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_imports_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_exports" (
  "export_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each export event */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of data */,
  "export_date" TEXT /* Date and time of export */,
  "export_type" TEXT /* Type of export (e.g., CSV, Excel) */,
  "destination" TEXT /* Destination of the data (e.g., email, API, file download) */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file if the data is exported to a file */,
  "export_status" TEXT /* Status of the export (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("export_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_exports_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validation" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation event */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of data */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date and time of validation */,
  "validation_result" TEXT /* Result of validation (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "validation_method" TEXT /* Method used for validation (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  "validator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the validation */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes from the validation process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validation_validator_id FOREIGN KEY ("validator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validation_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics event */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of data */,
  "analytics_date" TEXT /* Date and time of analytics */,
  "analytics_result" TEXT /* Result of analytics (e.g., insights, recommendations) */,
  "analyzed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the analytics */,
  "analysis_method" TEXT /* Method used for analytics (e.g., statistical, machine learning) */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the analytics result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analytics_analyzed_by FOREIGN KEY ("analyzed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analytics_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_learning" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each machine learning model */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of data */,
  "model_date" TEXT /* Date and time of model creation */,
  "model_result" TEXT /* Result of model prediction (e.g., forecast, classification) */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of machine learning model (e.g., regression, classification) */,
  "model_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "training_data_source" TEXT /* Source of the training data */,
  "testing_data_source" TEXT /* Source of the testing data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_machine_learning_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)
